name: QA 1179
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1179

Exercise the BCC PMDA ustat module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
